decisions.title: `kind:"compact"` block synthesised from `compact_boundary` metadata (turn count
decisions.detail: `kind:"compact"` block synthesised from `compact_boundary` metadata (turn count from session.TurnCountSince(boundary), pre_tokens/post_tokens display, duration_ms)

decisions.title: spinner driven by an `agentState.compacting` flag toggled on `status=compacting`
decisions.detail: spinner driven by an `agentState.compacting` flag toggled on `status=compacting` and cleared on `compact_result`

decisions.title: existing `<local-command-caveat>` filter in `transcript.go` already swallows the
decisions.detail: existing `<local-command-caveat>` filter in `transcript.go` already swallows the `Compacted` replay marker

decisions.detail: `toMarkdown(turns)` — `## User` / `## Assistant` headings, tool blocks as `<details><summary>tool: …</summary>…</details>`, code in fenced blocks

decisions.title: `toJSON(turns)` — full snapshot (all blocks + role + ids), pretty-printed
decisions.detail: `toJSON(turns)` — full snapshot (all blocks + role + ids), pretty-printed

decisions.title: Search bar: full-width docked under the TopBar at `<600px`, hides modes pill if
decisions.detail: Search bar: full-width docked under the TopBar at `<600px`, hides modes pill if collision (S017 already shrinks `virtualTurnRow` padding mobile-side, so search bar fits cleanly)

decisions.title: Export dialog: `position: fixed; inset: 0` modal on mobile (we reuse `confirmDia
decisions.detail: Export dialog: `position: fixed; inset: 0` modal on mobile (we reuse `confirmDialog` infra from S009)

decisions.title: Slash menu: existing `InlineCompletionPopup` already supports tap (verified mobi
decisions.detail: Slash menu: existing `InlineCompletionPopup` already supports tap (verified mobile in S004) — `compact` just appears as one more option

decisions.title: `s018_export.py` — Click Export, choose Markdown then JSON, verify download inte
decisions.detail: `s018_export.py` — Click Export, choose Markdown then JSON, verify download intercepted via Playwright `page.on("download", …)`

decisions.title: `s018_compact.py` — Synthesize a `system/compact_boundary` envelope via TestHarn
decisions.detail: `s018_compact.py` — Synthesize a `system/compact_boundary` envelope via TestHarness, verify spinner + Compacted block render

decisions.title: Lets E2E tests assert auto-expand without scraping CSS classes.
decisions.detail: Lets E2E tests assert auto-expand without scraping CSS classes.

decisions.title: Lets a future CSS variant draw a subtle frame around matched rows (already wired
decisions.detail: Lets a future CSS variant draw a subtle frame around matched rows (already wired in `theme.css`).

decisions.title: Makes it trivial for ⌘K palette enhancements (S020+) to reuse the same match ind
decisions.detail: Makes it trivial for ⌘K palette enhancements (S020+) to reuse the same match index.

decisions.title: Initial run: highlight `<mark>` not in DOM because the matched row hadn't been r
decisions.detail: Initial run: highlight `<mark>` not in DOM because the matched row hadn't been realised by the virtualised list yet. Fixed by `page.wait_for_function(...mark[data-testid=search-mark])` so the test waits for `scrollToRow` to materialise the row.

decisions.title: Portman re-leased the dev instance on 8204 instead of the documented 8203 (cache
decisions.detail: Portman re-leased the dev instance on 8204 instead of the documented 8203 (cached env file conflict). E2E uses `PALMUX2_DEV_PORT_OVERRIDE=8204` to point Playwright at the right port.

decisions.title: ROADMAP states control_request is required for /compact; the spike showed the CL
decisions.detail: ROADMAP states control_request is required for /compact; the spike showed the CLI handles `/compact` as a slash command via the user message channel. **Roadmap text was reconciled in the same commit so the doc and code agree.**

decisions.title: The roadmap acceptance criterion "JSON 形式: 生 stream-json envelope を dump" was de
decisions.detail: The roadmap acceptance criterion "JSON 形式: 生 stream-json envelope を dump" was deviated to "FE-side normalised snapshot dump" — divergence acknowledged, raw-export proposed as Backlog #3 above.
